description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a combination of light wood paneling and large glass windows, creating a bright and open atmosphere. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected volumes, including a main living area, a secondary wing, and a partially open courtyard. The roofline is varied, with prominent gable roofs and flat sections, adding visual interest and maximizing interior space. Outdoor amenities include a spacious patio with lounge chairs, a dining area, and a hot tub, seamlessly blending indoor and outdoor living. The windows are large and asymmetrically placed, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surroundings. The entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines and functionality.
description: A modern house with light wood paneling, large glass windows, and a mix of gable and flat roofs, featuring an open patio and spacious outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the patio area with outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open courtyard, hot tub, and lounge chairs, with visible interior beams and open spaces.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the connection between the main living area and the secondary wing, as well as the extensive use of glass and wood.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the secondary wing, minimal windows, and the clean, uninterrupted wood paneling.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with minimal trim, no porch, and clean lines emphasizing functionality
